chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1305 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6044/2020 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.6045/2020 (S/A) 28.09.2022 None present for the petitioner. It appears that instant petition was filed on 13.11.2020, and thereafter the petitioner has not pursued the matter diligently. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks a restraining order against respondent No.2 i.e. Mukhtiakrar, Khanrpur Mahar, District Ghotki not to change the record of the petitioner in Form VII with collusion of private respondents. The appropriate remedy is available to petitioner for redressal of his grievance under the revenue law, hence, this petition is dismissed being not maintainable along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
